Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Consolidate Actions For All Purposes Including Trial
Off Calendar Jun-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James P. Nevin of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties BRenda Ann Mello, et al.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS BRENDA ANN MELLO, ET AL.'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to consolidate actions numbered 274888 and 275916 for all purposes including trial pursuant to C.C.P 1048 and 377.62 is granted. Both actions involve common questions of law or fact and defendants will not be prejudiced by consolidation. The new consolidated actions will maintain the August 16, 2012, trial setting conference date. One order signed for both motions. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (503/TLJ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert L. Nelder of HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP (415-288-9800), appearing for defendant / moving party John Crane, Inc.
Jennifer L. Alesio of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Brenda Ann Mello, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT JOHN CRANE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant John Crane Inc.'s general demurrer to plaintiffs' complaint is sustained with ten days leave to amend to give plaintiffs an opportunity, if they are able to do so, to allege facts sufficient to meet the requirements of Bockrath v. Aldrich Chemical (1999) 21 Cal.4th 71. Prevailing party to prepare an order. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Claudia J. Knap of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #6099 (503/TLJ)

/ moving parties Leonard Mello (#274888) and Brenda Ann Mello, et al. (#275916)
David L. Barch of HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP (415-288-9801), appearing for defendant / opposing party John Crane, Inc.

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS BRENDA ANN MELLO, AS WRONGFUL DEATH HEIR, AND AS, DANIEL MELLO, JOSHUA MELLO, THOMAS MELLO'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

The Court was not aware of defendant John Crane Inc.'s opposition. Pursuant to parties' agreement the Court ordered plaintiffs' motion to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial continued to June 26, 2012 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 503. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
